passives.desc: Turn Start: in Deployment Order, inflict 1 [GiveMeCandy] against 1 enemy without [GiveMeCandy]
passives.name: Got Candy?

passives.desc:
At 10+ [FullCharon]...
- Turn Start: enter a forced Stagger State (for a turn)
- Turn End: remove [HungryCharon] and [FullCharon] completely
passives.name: I'm Stuffed

passives.desc:
Combat Start: Vergilius gains 1 [HungryCharon]
At 3 [HungryCharon], uses a devastating attack ("Vroom-Vroom")
※ Does not activate at "Combat Start" if this unit is Staggered due to [FullCharon]
passives.name: Vroom-vroom. Angry now

passives.desc: Inflict 1 [GiveMeCandy] to the target who attacked Kkomi
passives.name: Kkomi's not a Piñata

descs: [WinDuelAttack] If target has [GiveMeCandy], the target becomes Staggered next turn.
[DefeatDuel] Gain Indulged equal to [GiveMeCandy] on target.
[EndSkill] Completely remove [GiveMeCandy] from the target this unit clashed against

skills.desc:
Prioritizes targets with [GiveMeCandy]
[WhenUse] Coin Power +1 for every [GiveMeCandy] on target (max 5)
[DefeatDuel] Deal -50% final damage
skills.name: Gimme Candy.

skills.desc:
[BeforeAttack] Gain +(# of Identities with [GiveMeCandy]) Atk Weight (max 3)
[WhenUse] Deal +10% damage for every Identity with [GiveMeCandy] (max 50%)
[WhenUse] Coin Power +1 for every [GiveMeCandy] on the main target (max 5)
skills.name: No Candy.

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Coin Power +1 for every [GiveMeCandy] on target (max 5)
[DefeatDuel] Deal -50% final damage
skills.name: All of you...

skills.desc:
[CantDuel]
[WhenUse] Deal +20% damage for every Identity with [GiveMeCandy] (max 100%)
skills.name: Vroom-Vroom

skills.desc: [WhenUse] Apply 1 [GiveMeCandy] to 2 random enemies(prioritizes enemies without [GiveMeCandy])
skills.name: Eat. Together.

skills.desc:
[BeforeAttack] Gain +(# of Identities with [GiveMeCandy]) Atk Weight
[WhenUse] Deal +10% damage for every Identity with [GiveMeCandy] (max 50%)
[WhenUse] Gain Clash Power equal to the number of Identities with [GiveMeCandy] (max 5)
[DefeatDuel] Deal -80% final damage
skills.name: ... Kkomi's angry.

skills.desc:
[DuelCounter]
[WhenUse] All Parts gain 2 Clash Power Up next turn
[WhenUse] All Parts gain 2 Haste next turn
skills.name: You hit Kkomi.
